description_long: This object is a modern Apple iPhone in a dark green color, shown with its original retail packaging. The phone features a sleek, metallic and glass construction with a prominent triple-lens camera array on the back, positioned in the top left corner. The packaging is a matte black box with the Apple logo and 'iPhone' branding, and includes a molded plastic tray for holding the device. The phone itself has a minimalist design, with subtle side buttons and a smooth, reflective surface. The box is open in several views, revealing the interior tray and the phone partially removed. No screen content is visible, indicating the device is either powered off or the display is not shown.
description: A dark green Apple iPhone with a triple camera array, shown with its original black retail box and molded interior tray. The phone is sleek, metallic, and minimalist, with no visible screen content.
description_view_0: The phone rests on top of a closed black box, displaying the back with the triple camera array and Apple logo.
description_view_1: The phone stands upright in front of an open box, revealing the molded white tray inside and the Apple logo on the phone's back.
description_view_2: The open box is viewed from the front, showing the 'iPhone' branding and the phone leaning against the box's side.
description_view_3: The box is open and tilted, with the phone standing behind it and the Apple logo visible on the box's side.
attribute_brand_logo: A silver Apple logo is centered on the back of the phone and also appears on the side of the box.
attribute_screen_display_content: No content is visible; the screen appears to be off or not shown.
attribute_camera_placement: There is a triple camera array located in the top left corner on the back of the phone, arranged in a triangular pattern with a flash.
attribute_button_layout: Physical buttons are visible on the left and right edges of the phone, likely for volume and power; their shapes are slim and elongated.
attribute_case_or_cover_design: None; the phone is shown without any external case or cover.
